content: I just adopted the most amazing golden retriever from the shelter last week! Her name is Willow and she's been such a joy.
Congratulations! Golden retrievers are such wonderful dogs. How's she adjusting to her new home?
She's doing great! I've been taking her on runs with me since I'm training for a marathon in November. She has so much energy.
That's perfect! Golden retrievers make excellent running companions. How far are you running with her right now?
We're up to about 5 miles now. I started slow since she's still young, but she's a natural. I also take her to the dog park near my apartment where I teach yoga.
That sounds like a great routine for both of you! Does she come to your yoga classes too?
Not to the classes themselves, but she waits in my office during sessions. My students love when I bring her out at the end. I've been thinking about doing a 'doga' class with her.
A doga class would be so fun! Golden retrievers are so gentle and would be perfect for that. What made you decide to adopt from a shelter?
I've always believed in giving shelter dogs a home. Plus, I volunteer at the same shelter on weekends - I help with their social media and sometimes do comedy fundraisers for them.
That's amazing! You're making such a difference. How did Willow end up at the shelter?
She was surrendered by a family who couldn't care for her anymore. She's about 2 years old and already house-trained, which was perfect for my lifestyle.
She's lucky to have found you! It sounds like you two are a perfect match. Have you gotten her any special toys or treats yet?
